title: Senior/ Trade Executive (Shipping)
description:
Role Overview

This role supports the commercial and trade management functions by driving pricing strategies, yield optimization, and space utilization to maximize profitability. The position works closely with overseas offices, agents, and internal stakeholders to support trade services, forecasting, and business development initiatives.

  • 5 days work week - Shipping MNC

Key Responsibilities:

Pricing & Yield Management

  • Manage day-to-day pricing activities, including rate guidelines and surcharge setup

  • Perform yield management to optimize revenue and vessel profitability

  • Review customer free-time requests and handle related commercial matters

  • Conduct feasibility studies on pricing strategies and trade services

Market & Commercial Analysis

  • Gather and analyze market intelligence to maintain competitiveness

  • Prepare revenue and trade volume forecasts to support business planning

  • Produce monthly trade reports, including container business performance and contribution margin analysis

Space & Trade Management

  • Manage space allocation to ensure optimal utilization and maximize profit

  • Monitor space utilization for transshipment cargo and coordinate container stock management

  • Review agent performance in optimizing space utilization efficiency

  • Maintain the Trade Services Catalogue and prepare lifting reports

Stakeholder Coordination

  • Work closely with overseas branches on commercial initiatives and trade activities

  • Liaise with agents and internal stakeholders on trade services, including service launches, changes, and vessel deployment

  • Support business development initiatives related to trade services

  • Perform other ad-hoc duties as assigned by the supervisor


Job Requirements:

  • Degree in Business, Logistics Management, Maritime Studies, or a related discipline

  • Strong analytical, negotiation, and communication skills

  • Meticulous, proactive, and assertive with an outgoing personality

  • Ability to multitask, work independently, and perform under tight deadlines

  • Strong team player with a commercial mindset

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Interested applicants kindly click on “apply now” or send your updated resume to jayden.kua@peopleprofilers.com

Jayden Kua Jing Yu
